nasb.text: Lord, I have heard the report about You and I fear. O Lord, revive Your work in the midst of the years, In the midst of the years make it known; In wrath remember mercy.

esv.text: O Lord, I have heard the report of you, and your work, O Lord, do I fear. In the midst of the years revive it; in the midst of the years make it known; in wrath remember mercy.

cnv.text: 耶和華啊！我聽見你的聲音，懼怕你的作為； 求你在這些年間復興，在這些年間彰顯， 發怒的時候以憐憫為懷。

ccb.text: 耶和华啊，我听过你的威名； 耶和华啊，我对你的作为充满敬畏。 求你如今再次彰显你的作为， 求你发怒的时候仍以怜悯为念。
